## Overview

A clear description of what needs to be built or fixed and why it matters.

## Skills Required

- [ ] Python (async, FastAPI)
- [ ] TypeScript/React
- [ ] Testing (pytest / Jest)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Architecture Context

Brief description of where this fits in the codebase and which patterns to follow.

Reference files:

## Expected Behavior

Describe the desired outcome with acceptance criteria:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests pass

## Getting Started

1. Fork and clone the repository
2. Review the reference files listed above
3. Create a feature branch: `git checkout -b feature/<short-name>`
4. Implement, test, and open a PR against `dev`

## Questions?

Comment on this issue and a maintainer will help you get started.
